Class ZookeeperDependencies

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery.dependency.ZookeeperDependencies
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.zookeeper") public class ZookeeperDependencies extends Object
Representation of this service's dependencies in Zookeeper.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Marcin Grzejszczak, Olga Maciaszek-Sharma
